interaction: Blizzards appear on the minimap.
Gifts do not appear on the minimap. Kill Bots gifted to Amon do not appear on the minimap.
Kill Bots do not appear on the minimap.
The Laser Drill will be marked on the minimap when it attacks you.
Mag-mines appear on the minimap.
Missiles do not appear on the minimap.
Propagators do not appear on the minimap.
Purifier Beam appears as a red dot on the minimap.
The Turking does not appear on the minimap.
Void Rifts are marked on the minimap.
Boom Bots do not appear on the minimap.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops spawn Broodlings when they die.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops give out and receive Avenger stacks.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops get the Barrier buff.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops can carry Plague.
A single 1/1 Aggressive Deployment drop will spawn once the mutator rolls out.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops apply the Concussive Attacks debuff.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops get the Evasive Maneuvers buff.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops trigger Fatal Attraction when they die.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops can apply the Fear effect.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops do not launch Fireworks when they die.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops can capture gifts.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops cause Hardened Will to activate.
Aggressive Deployment drops do not contain Amon Heroes.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops can get the Inspiration buff.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops respawn when they die.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops have the Life Leech buff.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops get the Long Range buff.
Aggressive Deployment Drop kills increase the Naughty List count.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops all have Polarity applied to them.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops move can cast skills.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops set the ground on fire when they die.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops create an explosion when they die.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops move faster with Speed Freaks.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops can Transmute.
Void Reanimators can resurrect units from Aggressive Deployment Drops.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops spawn Infested when they die.
Units from Aggressive Deployment Drops are cloaked.
Broodlings can give out/receive Avenger stacks.
Broodlings get the Barrier buff.
Broodlings can carry Plague.
Broodlings get the Evasive Maneuvers buff.
Broodlings trigger Fatal Attraction when they die.
Broodlings can apply the Fear effect.
Broodlings launch Fireworks when they die.
Broodlings can capture gifts. Units spawned from Gift Exchange spawn Broodlings when they die.
Broodlings cause Hardened Will to activate.
Amon Heroes spawn Broodlings when they die.
Broodlings can get the Inspiration buff.
Broodlings respawn when they die.
Kill Bots spawn Broodlings when they die.
Broodlings have Life Leech.
Mag-mines do not spawn Broodlings when they detonate.
Mines spawn Broodlings when they are destroyed.
Missiles do not spawn Broodlings when destroyed.
Broodling kills increase the Naughty List count.
Infested and Aberrations do not spawn Broodlings units when killed.
Broodlings all have Polarity applied to them.
Broodlings can cast abilities.
Propagators spawn Broodlings when they die.
Broodlings set the ground on fire when they die.
Broodlings create an explosion when they die.
Broodlings move faster with Speed Freaks.
Broodlings can transmutate. Newly-transmuted units spawn Broodlings when they die.
Units spawned from Civilians spawn Broodlings when they die.
Turkeys do not spawn Broodlings when they die. Angry Turkeys spawn Broodlings when they die. The Turking does not spawn Broodlings when it dies.
Void Reanimators cannot resurrect Broodlings.
Units spawned from Void Rifts spawn Broodlings when they die.
Killed units spawn both, Infested and Broodlings at the same time. Infested units and Broodlings do not spawn units on death.
Broodlings are cloaked.
Boom Bots spawn Broodlings when they die.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange can give out/receive Avenger stacks.
Amon Heroes can give out (1 stack)/receive Avenger stacks.
Units with Avenger stacks can get the Inspiration buff.

Units do not give out/lose Avenger stacks when taking fatal damage and respawning. When a unit is finally killed, Avenger stacks are provided to surrounding units. Units retain their Avenger stacks when taking fatal damage and respawning.
Kill Bots can give out Avenger stacks (1 stack) when they die.
Mag-mines do not give out Avenger stacks when they detonate.
Mines can give out Avenger stacks, but cannot receive them.
Missiles do not give out Avenger stacks when destroyed.
Infested and Aberrations can give out/receive Avenger stacks.
Propagators can give out (1 stack)/receive Avenger stacks.
Units with Avenger stacks move faster with Speed Freaks.
Units lose their Avenger stacks after they Transmute.
Units spawned from Civilians give out and collect Avenger stacks.
Turkeys do not give out Avenger stacks. Angry Turkeys can give out (1 stack)/receive Avenger stacks. The Turking can give out (10 stacks) Avenger stacks.
Void Reanimators can give out (3 stacks) Avenger stacks. Resurrected units do not keep their Avenger stacks.
Units spawned from Void Rifts can give out/receive Avenger stacks.
Infested can give out/receive Avenger stacks.
Boom Bots do not give out Avenger stacks when they die.
Structures captured by Amon get the Barrier buff.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange get the Barrier buff.
Amon Heroes get the Barrier buff.

If a unit has used its Barrier buff, the respawned unit will not get the Barrier buff. If a unit has not used its Barrier buff, the respawned unit will have the Barrier buff activated when it respawns.
Mineral Shields get the Barrier buff.
Mines get the Barrier buff.
Missiles get the Barrier buff.
Infested and Aberrations get the Barrier buff.
Damage blocked by Polarity still triggers Barrier.
Propagators get the Barrier buff.
Transmuted units get the Barrier buff.
Units spawned from Civilians get the Barrier buff.
Turkeys do not get the Barrier buff.
Void Reanimators get the Barrier buff. Resurrected units get the Barrier buff.
Units spawned from Void Rifts get the Barrier buff.
Infested get the Barrier buff.
Units with Black Death will die twice as fast with Double Edged active.
Plague damage ticks do not have a chance of applying Fear.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange can carry Plague.
Amon Heroes can carry Plague.
Whether a unit has Plague or not is retained when it takes fatal damage. Plague only spreads when the unit is finnally killed.
Kill Bots cannot carry Plague.
Mag-mines cannot carry Plague.
Mines can carry Plague.
Missiles cannot carry Plague.
Infested and Aberrations can carry Plague.
Propagators can carry Plague.
Transmuted units may or may not carry Plague, irrespective of whether it carried Plague or not before Transmuting.
Units spawned from Civilians can carry Plague.
Turkeys cannot carry Plague. The Turking can carry Plague.
Void Reanimators can carry Plague. Resurrected units may or may not carry Plague, irrespective of whether it originally carried Plague or not before it died.
Units spawned from Void Rifts can carry Plague.
Infested can carry Plague.
Boom Bots cannot carry Plague.
Blizzard applies the Concussive Attacks debuff.
Blizzards appear on the minimap.
Blizzard can apply the Fear effect.
Blizzards can capture gifts.
Blizzards do not provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Blizzards are not cloaked.
Mineral Shields will always spawn on all mineral patches.
Mineral patches will have their total mineral count permanently reduced, even after Slim Pickings  cycles out.
Void Rifts will spawn 2:20 after they are activated, meaning only two spawns will occur.
Turrets captured by Amon apply the Concussive Attacks debuff.
Fireworks apply the Concussive Attacks debuff.

Turrets can be captured by Amon if they deal too much damage to themselves.
Damage dealt by Diffusion can trigger Fear.
Diffusion applies to all units spawned from Gift Exchange.
Damage dealt by Diffusion counts as Life Leech for the unit attacked.
Diffusion damages all units regardless of their Polarity.
Damage dealt by Diffusion can trigger Transmutation on enemy units.
Turrets can be captured by Amon if they deal too much damage to themselves.
Damage dealt by Double Edged does not trigger Fear.
Damage dealt by Double Edged does not trigger Life Leech.
Damage dealt by Double Edged does not trigger Transmutation.
Turrets captured by Amon can apply the Fear effect.
Kill Bots spawn out of structures converted by Eminent Domain.
Turrets captured by Amon have Life Leech.
Structures captured by Amon get the Long Range buff.
Infested and Aberrations spawn out of structures converted by Eminent Domain.
Structures captured by Amon get Polarity.
Structures hit by Propagators change to a Propagator and do not get converted. Propagators spawn out of structures converted by Eminent Domain.
The attack that kills a player's structure will not cause the enemy unit to Transmute.
Civilians spawn out of structures converted by Eminent Domain.
Structures destroyed by Turkeys will be converted.
Void Reanimators spawn out of structures converted by Eminent Domain.
Boom Bots spawn out of structures converted by Eminent Domain.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange get the Evasive Manuevers buff.
Amon Heroes do not get the Evasive Maneuvers buff.

Turkeys do not get the Evasive Maneuvers buff. Angry Turkeys get the Evasive Maneuvers buff. The Turking does not get the Evasive Maneuvers buff.
Void Reanimators do not get the Evasive Maneuvers buff.
Units spawned from Void Rifts get the Evasive Maneuvers buff.
Infested get the Evasive Maneuvers buff.

Units spawned from Gift Exchange launch Fireworks when they die.
Amon Heroes do not launch Fireworks when they die.
Kill Bots launch Fireworks when they die.
Mines do not launch Fireworks when they explode.
Mines do not launch Fireworks when they are destroyed.
Missiles do not launch Fireworks when they are destroyed.
Infested and Aberrations launch Fireworks when they die.
Propagators do not launch Fireworks when they die.

Units spawned from Void Rifts launch Fireworks when they die.

Units spawned from Gift Exchange can cause Hardened Will to activate. Hybrids and Kill Bots spawned from Gift Exchange can get the Hardened Will buff.
Gift spawns do not spawn an Amon Heroes with the capturing attack force. Amon Heroes can capture gifts.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange can get the Inspiration buff. Hybrids and Kill Bots spawned from Gift Exchange can provide the Inspiration buff.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange respawn when they die.
Kill Bots can capture gifts.
Gifts do not provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Lava Bursts cannot capture gifts.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange have Life Leech.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange get the Long Range buff.
Mag-mines can capture gifts.
Mines can capture gifts.
Missiles can capture gifts.
Hybrids spawned from Gift Exchange trigger Moment of Silence when they die.
Hybrids spawned from Gift Exchange detonate Hybrid Nukes when they die.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange kills increase the Naughty List count.
Infested and Aberrations can capture gifts.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange all have Polarity applied to them.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange can cast abilities.
Propagators can capture gifts.
Purifier Beam can capture gifts.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange set the ground on fire when they die.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange create an explosion when they die.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange move faster with Speed Freaks.
Temporal Fields cannot capture gifts. Units caught in a Temporal Field can still capture Gifts.
Time Warps cannot capture gifts. Units caught in a Time Warp can still capture gifts.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange can Transmute.
Turkeys cannot capture gifts. Angry Turkeys can capture gifts. The Turking can capture gifts.
Twisters can capture gifts.
Void Reanimators can capture gifts. Void Reanimators can resurrect units spawned from Gift Exchange. Void Reanimators do not resurrect Kill Bots.
Units spawned from Void Rifts can capture gifts.
Infested can capture gifts. Units spawned from Gift Exchange spawn Infested when they die.
Units spawned from Gift Exchange are cloaked.
Boom Bots do not capture gifts.
The Laser Drill has vision of the area for a short time after the nuke hits.
Amon Heroes can get the Hardened Will buff.
Kill Bots can get the Hardened Will buff.
Mag-mines do not cause Hardened Will to activate.
Mines cause Hardened Will to activate.
Missiles cause Hardened Will to activate.
Infested and Aberrations cause Hardened Will to activate.
Propagators can get the Hardened Will buff.
Purifier Beam does not cause Hardened Will to activate.
Transmuted units cause Hardened Will to activate.
Units spawned from Civilians can cause Hardened Will to activate. Hybrids spawned from Civilians can get the Hardened Will buff.
Turkeys do not cause Hardened Will to activate. Angry Turkeys cause Hardened Will to activate. The Turking can get the Hardened Will buff.
Units spawned from Void Rifts cause Hardened Will to activate. Hybrids spawned from Void Rifts can get the Hardened Will buff.
Infested cause Hardened Will to activate.
Boom Bots do not get the Hardened Will buff.
Amon Heroes can provide the Inspiration buff.
Amon Heroes respawn when they die.

Amon Heroes do not get the Long Range buff.

Amon Hero kills increase the Naughty List count.
Amon's Karax's spawned structures will have Photon Overload applied when damaged.
Amon Heroes all have Polarity applied to them.
Amon Heroes can cast abilities other than the ones they already have.
Amon Heroes set the ground on fire when they die.
Amon Heroes create an explosion when they die.
Amon Heroes move faster with Speed Freaks.
Amon Heroes do not Transmute after killing a unit.
Void Reanimators do not resurrect Amon Heroes.
Amon Heroes spawn Infested when they die.
Amon Heroes are cloaked.
Kill Bots can provide the Inspiration buff.
Infested and Aberrations can get the Inspiration buff.
Propagators can provide the Inspiration buff.
Transmuted units can get the Inspiration buff.
Units spawned from Civilians can get the Inspiration buff. Hybrids spawned from Civilians can provide the Inspiration buff.
Turkeys do not get the Inspiration buff. Angry Turkeys get the Inspiration buff. The Turking can provide the Inspiration buff.
Void Reanimators can get the Inspiration buff.
Units spawned from Void Rifts can get the Inspiration buff. Hybrids spawned from Void Rifts can provide the Inspiration buff.
Infested can get the Inspiration buff.
Boom Bots do not provide the Inspiration buff.
Kill Bots do not respawn when they self-destruct. They will respawn if killed by Abathur's Toxic Nests.
Respawned units have Life Leech.
Mag-mines do not respawn when they explode.
Mines respawn when they are destroyed.
Missiles respawn when destroyed.
Units do not trigger Moment of Silence when taking fatal damage and respawning.
Hybrids do not detonate Hybrid Nukes when taking fatal damage and respawning.
Units do not increase the Naughty List count when taking fatal damage and respawning.
Infested and Aberrations respawn when they die.
Polarity reverses after a unit respawns.
Propagators respawn when they die. When a Propagator Propagates a unit, the new Propagator will have the Just Die! buff applied to it too and will need to be killed twice.
Units do not set the ground of fire when taking fatal damage and respawning.
Units do set the ground on fire when taking fatal damage and respawning.
Respawned units keep moving faster with Speed Freaks.
Transmutated units have their Just Die stacks reset, allowing them to respawn again.
Units spawned from Civilians respawn when they die.
Turkeys do not respawn when they die. The Turking respawns when it dies.
Void Reanimators respawn when they die. Resurrected units respawn when they die.
Units spawned from Void Rifts respawn when they die.
Infested respawn when they die.
Respawned units are cloaked.
Boom Bots do not respawn when they self-destruct.

Kill Bots provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Kill Bots do not spawn from the Laser Drill.
Kill Bots get the Long Range buff.
Kill Bots trigger Moment of Silence when they die.
Kill Bots can cast abilities. Kill bots can spawn out of Point Defense Drones dropped by Power Overwhelming.
Kill Bots set the ground on fire when they die.
Kill Bots create an explosion when they die.
Kill Bots move faster with Speed Freaks.
Kill Bots do not Transmute when dealing damage or killing units.
Void Reanimators do not resurrect Kill Bots.
Kill Bots do not spawn from Void Rifts.
Kill Bots spawn Infested when they die.
Kill Bots are cloaked.
Lava Bursts do not provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Laser Drill has Life Leech.
Mag-mines provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Mineral Shields provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Mines provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Missiles do not provide vision for the Laser Drill.

Infested and Aberrations provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Infested and Aberrations do not spawn from the Laser Drill.
The Laser Drill does not get Photon Overcharge when damaged.
Polarity of the Laser Drill remains fixed, even when the drill respawns after being destroyed.
Propagators provide vision for the Laser Drill. Propagators do not spawn from the Laser Drill.
Purifier Beams do not provide vision for the Laser Drill.
The area inside a Temporal Field provides vision for the Laser Drill.
Time Warps do not provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Transmuted units provide vision for the Laser Drill.
The Candy Bowl provides vision for the Laser Drill. Units spawned from Civilians provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Normal Turkeys do not provide vision for the Laser Drill. Angry Turkeys provide vision for the Laser Drill. The Turking provides vision for the Laser Drill.
Twisters do not provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Void Reanimators provide vision for the Laser Drill. Void Reanimators do not spawn from the Laser Drill.
Units spawned from Void Rifts provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Infested provide vision for the Laser Drill.

Boom Bots provide vision for the Laser Drill.
Boom Bots do not spawn from the Laser Drill.
Lava Bursts are not cloaked.

Boom Bots create an explosion when they die.
Transmuted units move faster with Speed Freaks.
Units spawned from Civilians move faster with Speed Freaks.
Turkeys do not move faster with Speed Freaks. The Turking moves faster with Speed Freaks.
Void Reanimators move faster with Speed Freaks. Resurrected units move faster with Speed Freaks.
Units spawned from Void Rifts move faster with Speed Freaks.
Infested units move faster with Speed Freaks.
Boom Bots move faster with Speed Freaks.
Temporal Fields are not cloaked.
Time Warps are not cloaked.
Units spawned from Civilians can Transmute.
Turkeys can transmute when they deal damage or kill a unit. The Turking does not transmute.
Resurrected units can Transmute.
Units spawned from Void Rifts can transmute.
Infested can transmute. Newly-transmuted units spawn Infested when they die.
Transmuted units are cloaked.
Void Reanimators can resurrect units spawned from Civilians.
Civilians do not spawn from Void Rifts.
Units spawned from Civilians spawn Infested when they die.
Units spawned from Civilians are cloaked.
Void Reanimators can resurrect Turkeys. Void Reanimators do not resurrect the Turking.
Turkeys do not spawn Infested when they die. Angry Turkeys spawn Infested when they die. The Turking does not spawn Infested when it dies.
Turkeys are not cloaked. The Turking is cloaked.
Twisters are not cloaked.

Void Reanimators can resurrect units spawned from Void Rifts.
Void Reanimators do not spawn from Void Rifts.
Void Reanimators can resurrect Infested.
Void Reanimators are cloaked.
Void Reanimators do not resurrect Boom Bots.
Units spawned from Void Rifts spawn Infested when they die.
Units spawned from Void Rifts are cloaked.
Boom Bots do not spawn from Void Rifts.
Infested are cloaked.
Boom Bots spawn Infested when they die.

Boom Bots are cloaked, but their tags are still visible.
Codes cannot be input without detection.
